## Scope

- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] GitHub/repo metadata

## Bek Invariants

- [ ] Users still see one Slack teammate: `@bek`.
- [ ] Users are not asked to choose among multiple agent names.
- [ ] Admins remain in control of channels, access bundles, tools, repos, models, budgets, and approvals.
- [ ] Risky writes remain auditable and approval-gated unless admin policy explicitly allows them.
- [ ] No raw secrets are added to prompts, logs, sandboxes, fixtures, screenshots, or docs.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] Targeted tests:
- [ ] Docs reviewed for current-vs-planned accuracy:
